data.title: Zions Bancorp Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Earnings
Kimberly-Clark's Growth Potential 'Underestimated,' Analyst Sees Attractive Entry Point
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst Bonnie Herzog highlights Kimberly-Clark's underestimated growth potential, despite mixed Q3 results, offering a favorable entry point.

data.title: A Look Into Clorox Inc's Price Over Earnings
These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On WR Berkley After Q3 Results
General Motors Continues To Defy Expectations Thanks To Pickups And U.S. Demand
data.description: On Tuesday, General Motors (NYSE: GM) easily surpassed Wall Street’s third-quarter expectations, raising its key guidance target for the full year fueled by the strength of its North America operations.
